data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multi-channel capabilities (email, SMS, push notification) for the marketing sequence builder. However, the evidence only confirms the existence of email-based campaigns and does not provide any information regarding SMS or push notification capabilities. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for SMS and push notification capabilities in the marketing sequence builder.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
